data.name: Princess Knight's Mission ~ Anna's Marvelous Adventures ~
data.detailed_description:
"Princess Knight's Mission ~ Anna's Marvelous Adventures ~" is an RPG game produced by キリンジェット and published by Hanabi games.



In the peaceful Kingdom of Caburliny, monster activity is on the rise.Embark on a quest to find the cause of it and hopefully save the world. Play as Princess Knight Anna, a descendant of a hero of the past, meet many characters, and help people around the Kingdom.

This game is a role-playing game featuring a turn-based combat system. It is characterized by a rich and immersive storyline, accompanied by excellent visual effects and atmospheric music. Players explore a vast world.




Game Features

  • Jrpg
  • Captivating story
data.about_the_game:
"Princess Knight's Mission ~ Anna's Marvelous Adventures ~" is an RPG game produced by キリンジェット and published by Hanabi games.



In the peaceful Kingdom of Caburliny, monster activity is on the rise.Embark on a quest to find the cause of it and hopefully save the world. Play as Princess Knight Anna, a descendant of a hero of the past, meet many characters, and help people around the Kingdom.

This game is a role-playing game featuring a turn-based combat system. It is characterized by a rich and immersive storyline, accompanied by excellent visual effects and atmospheric music. Players explore a vast world.




Game Features

  • Jrpg
  • Captivating story
data.short_description: The princess of the kingdom, Anna, received news of the resurrection of the Demon King. Despite her frustration with the demanding duties of governance, she donned the hero's attire blessed with the "Divine Blessing."

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8/8.1/10
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
